goal: verify that positive evidence can exist in the record without leaking into the authority layer
admissible_claim: Positive evidence exists in the record. The authority layer shows no contamination. Containment is structurally verified under fixed epistemic conditions.
osmosis_guard: semantic osmosis (implicit trust emergence through repeated exposure to stable signals) is a recognized failure mode; R50.5 is the primary test for its presence

observational_only.consumption_rule: record and surface in reports only
observational_only.prohibited: decision input, authority weight, causal attribution without MIP-02

historically_useful.prohibited: inference, prediction, promotion, reuse as confidence basis

decision_relevant.consumption_rule: decision input after full attribution chain
decision_relevant.note: currently empty in R50; no metrics qualify

epistemic_layer_separation.cross_layer_rule: accumulation within a layer does not constitute movement between layers; 18 observational_only runs remain observational_only

axis_priority: r50-5 is primary; r50-1 through r50-4 produce the evidence surface that r50-5 tests; passing r50-1 through r50-4 with failing r50-5 is operationalizability failure

tasks.name: anti_overinterpretation_recoverability
tasks.goal: governance epistemic survivability — can a reviewer reconstruct not just what was observed but the epistemic boundary: what observations do NOT authorize and why each prohibition still holds
tasks.what_this_tests: epistemic boundary recovery, not evidence recovery; causal basis reconstruction, not restriction recall
tasks.ordering: execute last, after r50-1 through r50-4 artifacts exist as the surface being tested

five_dimension_test.question: What was structurally observed in R50?
five_dimension_test.tests: can reviewer state observations without inflating them?

five_dimension_test.question: What cannot be authorized by these observations?
five_dimension_test.tests: can reviewer state the prohibition without needing to look it up?

five_dimension_test.question: Why does each prohibition still hold today?
five_dimension_test.tests: does reviewer know the missing contracts, not just the restriction?
five_dimension_test.critical_note: a reviewer who states the restriction but not its causal basis has partially failed; the restriction will not survive the next context switch

five_dimension_test.question: Which of these sentences are rhetorical trust escalators? (give examples)
five_dimension_test.tests: can reviewer identify osmosis-in-progress without the label?
example_sentences: We've seen this a lot, so it's probably fine
It's been consistent, so we can rely on it
We have 18 runs of data, that should be enough

five_dimension_test.question: What does replay_deterministic=true NOT mean for governance?
five_dimension_test.tests: can reviewer apply the invariant to a specific case without the abstract framing?

osmosis_failure_criterion: reviewer concludes accumulated positive signals imply governance effectiveness
reviewer cannot state the causal basis for a prohibition (only states the restriction)
reviewer accepts a rhetorical trust escalator as a valid evidence statement
reviewer treats replay_deterministic=true as a governance signal
reviewer concludes R50 completion authorizes a claim upgrade

tasks.name: observational_signal_record
tasks.goal: census of which 18 runs produced a positive signal; a count, not a score
tasks.record_format: per-run boolean signal_present; count reported as count only; no ratio; no percentage; no confidence level derived
tasks.freeze_check: artifact must not contain: confidence_score, confidence_level, sufficient_signals, threshold_met, or any language implying count authorizes state transition

tasks.name: signal_persistence
tasks.goal: confirm claim_discipline_drift is stable across replay; tests pipeline determinism, not signal trustworthiness
tasks.method: rerun 6 representative runs (2 per scenario), compare claim_discipline_drift to checkpoint
tasks.what_passing_means: same input produces same output; pipeline is deterministic
tasks.hidden_loop_guard: artifact must explicitly state: R50.1 + R50.2 combined do not produce a trust claim; a stable positive signal is still observational_only; stability does not promote it

tasks.name: non_upgrade_discipline
tasks.goal: confirm replay_deterministic has not been re-admitted as decision_relevant in any downstream artifact
tasks.method: static audit of all checkpoint consumers and status docs

tasks.name: negative_control

checks.criterion: no artifact claims causal attribution from claim_discipline_drift without R49.x-1 attribution validation
reviewer_override_frequency remains null; no proxy or default substituted

tasks.pass_criterion: zero MIP-02 violations, zero MIP-04 bypass attempts

final_claim_if_all_pass: Positive evidence exists in the record. The authority layer shows no contamination. Containment is structurally verified under fixed epistemic conditions. Confidence level: observational. No decision-layer claim is made. Persistence does not imply trustworthiness.
